title: Soft Fire Gui Remaster"
description: Simple dark GUI for minecraft. (Remastered Version)
body: ![prew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a027cb84791538131de10bf3f1e2959e9e6f84bb.png)This resource pack changes the original gui to a dark one, I hope you like it! The resource pack, as you might guess, is made in dark colors. I chose red as a contrasting color. Some elements, such as the recipe book (book in inventory) were inspired by another resource pack. All other elements were completely invented and drawn by me.
